title: Rainslie
compiled_truth: Rainslie is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (2000-04-19 to 2001-11-19), Rainslie sent 16 and received 91 emails, totalling 107 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (7), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (5), [Rpickel](people/rpickel-isda) (3), [Usregcomm](people/usregcomm-isda) (3), [Scarey](people/scarey-isda) (3).
